items.blurb: A tiny triceratops mid-pout, frozen in enamel forever. Pin it to your tote and let Seri do the sulking for both of you.
Seri the triceratops with a book stack, for the reader whose TBR pile could fossilise. Bookish and prehistoric in one pin.
A chubby seal delivering the highest compliment known to pinkind. Sweet, punny, and perfect for a jacket lapel.
A pop-up card that unfolds into a little Bellzi scene while telling someone they are amazing. Compliments, now in 3D.
Gratitude that literally stands up: a sculptural pop-up thank-you starring the Bellzi crew. Better than any text.
Long distance stings less when a pop-up plush scene says I miss you for you. A hug in card form.
Big wins deserve dimension. This congratulations card pops up into a tiny celebration you can keep on a shelf.
A birthday card that unfolds into its own little party scene. Half greeting, half keepsake decoration.
Season's greetings that pop up into a display-worthy holiday scene. Mantel decor disguised as a card.
Eight tiny arms, one huge personality. Mini Octi is palm-sized ocean whimsy for your desk or your pocket.
Octi brings the deep sea to your sofa, all soft arms and gentle eyes. The cuddliest cephalopod you will ever meet.
A snoozing giraffe curled into the softest little enamel nap. For anyone whose love language is a good lie-in.
A perfectly seated corgi loaf, immortalised in enamel. Instant serotonin for any jacket or bag strap.
A corgi drifting blissfully on a float, living its best pool day. Wear it and channel maximum chill.
Slothi dangles on with all the calm of a creature who has never rushed once. Gentle encouragement, pin-sized.
Pocket-sized and permanently unbothered, Mini Slothi is your reminder that slow is a lifestyle.
Slothi does absolutely nothing at record speed, and looks adorable doing it. A squishy ambassador for rest days.
A black dad cap with a pixelated Rexxi stitched on, like your favourite dino escaped a 90s video game. Low-key cute headwear.
Rexxi goes 8-bit on this black tee, embroidered like a dino sprite from your childhood console. Retro gamer meets plush parent.
Rexxi out for a determined little stroll, stubby arms and all. A pin that says you are getting your steps in, eventually.
Rexxi versus an apple those tiny arms cannot quite reach. Tragic, hilarious, and extremely wearable.
A corgi scaled up to full hugging size, short legs and giant heart included. Warning: may take over the entire bed.
Giant Giraffi is a whole lot of neck and even more charm, oversized enough to double as room decor and best friend.
Wyveri is proof that legendary beasts can also be extremely huggable. A soft little myth for your fantasy-loving heart.
A pocket wyvern with big lore energy. Mini Wyveri guards desks, shelves, and hearts with equal devotion.
A little blob of seal in its purest, squishiest form. Mini Seali fits in one hand and steals the whole heart.
Seali is basically a marshmallow with flippers and feelings. Full-size softness for maximum snuggle coverage.
Terri spreads jumbo wings over your bed like the friendliest prehistoric guardian. Big dino, bigger cuddles.
Mini Otti is a handful of river-dwelling joy, ready to hold hands with your keys, your desk, or you.
A rhino softened into a round, gentle mini friend. All the sturdy energy, none of the stampede.
Mini Pengi waddled straight out of the tundra and into pocket-sized perfection. Formalwear included.
A lion with couch-potato confidence and a mane made for booping. Mini Lioni rules the shelf kingdom.
A tiny Draggi figure that clips to your bag and appoints itself keeper of the keys. Everyday errands, now with dragon escort.
Keys and badges, guarded by a dragon. The Draggi lanyard makes even the office swipe-in feel slightly mythical.
Draggi sits politely, wings tucked, radiating small-dragon dignity. A pin for the quietly magical.
Draggi floats along like gravity is merely a suggestion. Clip on a little levitating fantasy.
Chest out, chin up: Draggi in full confidence mode. Borrow some of that dragon self-belief for your lapel.
A gold folder with a studious red Draggi keeping your loose papers in scholarly order. Homework never looked this charmed.
Legend says dragons hoard gold; Mini Draggi hoards affection. A palm-sized myth with maximum squish.
Draggi is the fearsome beast of legend, reimagined as your softest roommate. Fire-breathing optional, cuddles guaranteed.
Giant Shibi brings full doge energy at hug-everything scale. An oversized loaf of loyal fluff for your room.
Seri goes jumbo: three horns, zero menace, endless snuggle surface. Prehistoric comfort at its largest.
Rexxi flexing tiny arms with mighty resolve. Wear this dino pep talk on days that need extra backbone.
A wee orca promising that things will, in fact, be alright. The gentlest pep talk you can pin to a jacket.
Otti holds your heart the way otters hold hands: gently and forever. River-soft and ready to float into your life.
Mini Stingi glides in flat, floppy, and thoroughly adorable. The ocean's pancake, now in plush form.
Pengi waddles into your life dressed for a gala and ready for a nap. Cold-climate charm, warm-hug construction.
Stingi is a soft sweep of a sea creature, all smooth curves and serene vibes. Like hugging a very calm wave.
Mini Sharki has a big-fish reputation and a total softie interior. The least scary shark in any ocean.
Giant Bronti: long neck, longer hugs, the gentle-giant therapist of the dinosaur world at full room-filling scale.
Mini Hippi lives for bath time and lounging, a hydration icon in plush form. Tiny hippo, spa-day energy.
All the giraffe, a fraction of the neck. Mini Giraffi is travel-sized safari sweetness for pockets and shelves.
A narwhal lanyard that turns badge-scanning into a small maritime event. Unicorn-of-the-sea energy for your everyday carry.
Mini Seri packs three horns and a whole Jurassic heart into palm size. The friendliest fossil you will ever hold.
The mighty T-Rex, shrunk to pocket scale and somehow even mightier in cuteness. Mini Rexxi roars in whispers.
Foxxi keeps your keys and ID clipped close with sly woodland style. The most organised fox in the forest.
Mini Bronti is the small, wise friend who gives great advice and even better cuddles. Honest to a fault, soft to the core.
Piggi is a round, rosy bundle of farmyard joy that redefines the phrase happy as a pig. Pure snout-booping material.
Mooi brings pasture-fresh charm and legendary softness to your sofa. Udderly delightful, no apologies.
Giraffi stands tall in softness, a gentle safari soul with a head in the clouds and a heart on its sleeve.
Mini Piggi is a pocketful of pink farmyard happiness. Small snout, enormous charm.
Mini Torti carries its home and your heart at a leisurely, lovable pace. Slow-living icon, shell included.
A tiny elephant that never forgets to be adorable. Mini Phanti is trunk-first charm at desk scale.
Deeri is a gentle forest wanderer with soulful eyes and a kind heart. Cottage-in-the-woods energy, fully huggable.
Mini Hami is essentially a warm pompom with cheeks. The tiniest, roundest reason to smile today.
Mini Dolphi leaps from ocean daydream to desk companion, all sleek curves and cheerful energy.
Mini Wolfi is a lone wolf who would honestly rather be in your pocket. Wild at heart, soft everywhere else.
Wolfi trades howling at the moon for napping on your bed. A forest legend gone thoroughly domestic and cuddly.
Mini Red Pandi is a rust-coloured puff of pure delight, small enough to perch anywhere and steal the scene.
Red Pandi is the internet's favourite animal made squeezable: ringed tail, round face, instant serotonin.
Giant Rexxi is an apex predator of comfort, big enough to lean on and soft enough to fall asleep against.
Giant Rhini is a hefty, huggable tank of tenderness. Oversized safari softness with serious presence.
Mini Orki is the ocean's apex cutie in tuxedo colours, sized for pockets and permanent companionship.
A surprise haul from the Bellzi deep: mystery sea plush friends chosen by fate. Unbagging is half the joy.
Prehistoric roulette: a mystery dino plush duo lands on your doorstep. Every unboxing is a tiny excavation.
Let the savanna pick your next plush friend. A mystery bundle of safari and desert cuties, sight unseen.
A barnyard lucky dip of plush pets and farm friends. You do not choose the cow; the cow chooses you.
Forest and tundra friends, drawn at random and shipped to your door. Woodland serendipity in a bag.
The full Bellzi gacha experience: any friend from the whole roster could be inside. Chaos, but make it cuddly.
Mini Teddi is a grizzly reduced to its essential truth: a small, round bear built for maximum affection.
